targetDevice.name: STM32F405RGT6
targetDevice.notes: Concrete Cortex-M4 target for the Olimex STM32-H405 board extraction. Community topology sources are package-filtered to STM32F405RG/STM32F405RGTx and are used only where the official ST sources are sparse.

sources.notes: Board-level target identity and board context. The page also notes later GD32 substitutions; this extraction intentionally targets the STM32F405RGT6 path requested by the user.
Official STM32F405/415 family datasheet referenced by the exact-chip community metadata.
Official reference manual for STM32F405/415 and related STM32F4 devices.
Official ST CMSIS device header for CPU feature flags, memory-base macros, and IRQ numbers.
Official ST startup vector source for interrupt ordering cross-check.
Commit-pinned snapshot of ST's STM32F4 SVD bundle as vendored by stm32-rs. Used as the primary structural register source via STM32F405.svd.
Community patch recipe documenting known STM32F405 adjustments relative to the base SVD.
Exact-chip structured topology for package-filtered pins, peripheral RCC bindings, interrupt routes, and DMA route candidates.
Commit-pinned Embassy HAL manifest showing the stm32f405rg feature in the supported chip list.
